10.reason: [The program uses the deprecated and unsafe function 'gets', which was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers. Additionally, the code does not implement graph traversal (DFS/BFS), vertex deletion, or any logic related to the problem description鈥攊t merely echoes input lines. This fundamental mismatch with the problem requirements leads to both compilation issues (due to 'gets') and logical failure.]
